title: Clam Addons
description: Adds clams as a rare creature with new drops, armors, and weapons!
body:
Clam Addons adds:
- New armor made with clam shells thats slightly better than iron armor and slightly worse than diamond armor
- New sword made with clam guts thats slightly better than an iron sowrd and slightly worse than a diamond sword
- New mob "Clam" that drops 2 new items "Clam Guts" and "Clam Shells"


Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/Swaix](https://www.patreon.com/Swaix)
Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/swaix](https://ko-fi.com/swaix)
Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt
